title.en: One more Infinite Ancestral Endowment is not ve...

content.en:
One more Infinite Ancestral Endowment is not very helpful to Ye Tian.

At this moment, he was curious as to why the blood was sealed here.

It was now clear to him that the purpose of cutting off Black Mountain was to seal the blood, and this should be the center of the seal.

As soon as he entered here, he was sealed with ninety percent of his strength, which shows how terrifying the seal here is.

And the seal on the body of the raccoon blood is even stronger, and the dense seal chains bind him, and this black ocean is also the seal energy, all pressed on the body of the blood.

With such a powerful seal, Ye Tian felt that if he sealed himself, even if he broke through to the mid-level immeasurable lifeform now, he would not have the slightest hope of getting out of the predicament.

Ye Tian can't sense how powerful the raccoon blood is, because the energy on the body of the raccoon blood has been sealed, and even if it escapes some, it is only an insignificant amount of energy, and its strength cannot be judged.

But even the energy that escaped, it definitely surpassed the ordinary middle-level immeasurable life forms.

"At the very least, it's a high-level immeasurable lifeform!"

Ye Tian said secretly in his heart.

At this time, the blood stared at Ye Tian, with a slight hint of excitement in his expression.

"There's a primary-level immeasurable lifeform here, and it looks like I've succeeded. Little one, I want to make a deal with you!"

Vicky said.

"What deal?" Ye Tian asked.

Vicious Blood looked at this heaven and earth and said: "It's very simple, you only need to help me break the nodes of the seal, and after success, I can give you benefits." "

Breaking the Seal Node?

Ye Tian secretly sneered, how could he be so stupid, what if he broke the seal and released blood, what if this guy killed him?

With such a dangerous existence, the entire Silent Black Sea could not stop him.

So, it's impossible for him to release blood!

Still, he could have come up with something.

"You're all sealed, what other good things do you have?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

Vicious Blood laughed wildly: "I naturally have a lot of good things on my body, such as the secret technique of the immeasurable body, breaking through the inheritance of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, etc., and the blood on my body can greatly improve the life level, I can also give you some, and even hope to help you break the shackles of the life level and easily step into the realm of the middle-level immeasurable lifeforms." "

If it were other primary-level immeasurable lifeforms, I am afraid that they would really be moved, but Ye Tian was not moved.

With his talent, it is naturally not difficult to become a mid-level immeasurable lifeform, but as for the high-level immeasurable lifeform, it is still far away, and now that he has obtained the inheritance, it is useless.

And the blood of the raccoon blood, he didn't dare to use it, after all, the raccoon blood was still alive, maybe he could control him through blood.

So, the benefits promised by the blood were hardly appealing to him.

Ye Tian did not answer positively whether he was willing to trade or not, but asked, "Why are you sealed here?"

At the mention of this question, the raccoon blood suddenly became crazy, and the tyrannical aura far surpassed that of the jellyfish.

"I didn't do anything wrong, why seal me, I want to kill !!!"

The blood became extremely violent, and it seemed that his reason had been completely lost.

And Ye Tian stood aside, watching quietly.

He did understand the raccoon blood a little, after all, the raccoon blood had been sealed for too long, and it was not surprising that it had become abnormal.

It took a long time for the blood to regain its composure.

"Little one, I'm just sealed by some enemy, so it's inconvenient to tell you the details. Vicky Blood said.

"Then I won't help you!"

Ye Tian directly refused.

"You're looking for death!"

Seeing that Ye Tian rejected him, he wanted to pinch Ye Tian to death.

To him, a mere primary-level immeasurable lifeform is simply an ant, which can be pinched to death at will.

But he could only roar angrily, because he couldn't help Ye Tian at all, and he couldn't kill Ye Tian if he wanted to.

Abrupt.

"Little guy, if you don't agree to cooperate with me, you won't be able to leave here at all. Ninety percent of your strength has been sealed now, and you can't leave this sealed void at all. If you trade with me, I can help you get out at a price. "

"If you can't get out, you can't get out, I don't care!"

Ye Tian smiled.

He's just a replica body, and the loss is the loss.

Seeing that Ye Tian was not panicked at all, he was very surprised.

After all, if you can't get out of here if you're sealed, you won't even be able to practice!

Isn't Ye Tian panicking?

Suddenly, Vicious thought of a possibility.

"Could it be that you're not the real body, it's a doppelganger?"

Vicious Blood was shocked.

"So what?"

Ye Tian sneered.

"You are a primary-level immeasurable lifeform, and if you want to condense a clone of a primary-level immeasurable lifeform, you need an extremely rare treasure, but I didn't expect you to get such a treasure. But this kind of treasure is very rare, why would you waste a clone?" Vicious Blood still wanted to try to persuade Ye Tian to cooperate with him.

"I really don't lack such treasures, so I don't care about this clone!"

Ye Tian said clearly.

Seeing this, Raccoon knew that Ye Tian was not simple, and he was afraid that he would not be able to look down on the conditions he gave.

So, he said, "Little guy, I know your worries, and you are worried that after I get out of trouble, I will kill you and destroy the world where you are." In this case, if you have any hope of becoming a high-level immeasurable life form, you will release me. As a deal, I can give you a big opportunity right now, how about it?"

"You're a high-level immeasurable lifeform?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" replied, "I am a high-level immeasurable lifeform, and I am an extremely powerful existence among high-level immeasurable lifeforms. I have sensed the breath of a superior immeasurable body from you, and you have a great hope of advancing to a high-level immeasurable life form in the future. So, I'm working with you like this, so you don't have to worry about me killing you!"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, there seemed to be no harm in this kind of cooperation, and when he became a high-level immeasurable lifeform, there would be no need to be afraid of this blood, even if he was released, there would be no problem.

"What's the big chance you're talking about?"

Ye Tian asked.

At this time, the blood of the fox said slowly: "There is a treasure land left by me in the Xuanqi Realm, which will help you raise your immeasurable body to the Xiaocheng realm, and some other opportunities are enough to make your strength soar!"

"Okay, I agree!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Then conclude the Immeasurable Contract!"

Vicky said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian agreed.

Immediately, he made an immeasurable contract with the blood, and if he broke it, he would pay a great price.
